name: Content: Suggest Ideas

description.en: Generate social media content ideas based on niche and timeframe.
description.de: Generiere Social-Media Content-Ideen basierend auf Branche und Zeitraum.
description.fr: Generez des idees de contenu pour les reseaux sociaux selon le secteur et la periode.
description.es: Genera ideas de contenido para redes sociales segun el nicho y el periodo.
description.ro: Genereaza idei de continut pentru retelele sociale pe baza nisei si a perioadei.

bot: When this warp is triggered: generate 3-5 content ideas based on the content-calendar-austria skill, the current date/season, and the customer's niche. Format as a numbered list with emoji, suggested platform, and brief description for each idea. Do NOT use Studio tools -- this is text-only output. Send the ideas as a formatted message in the current room.

actions.prompt: Generate 3-5 social media content ideas for this week. Consider the current season, upcoming holidays, and the business niche. Format as a numbered list with suggested platform and brief description for each.

inputs.name: Niche

description.en: Industry or niche to generate ideas for
description.de: Branche oder Nische, fuer die Ideen generiert werden
description.fr: Secteur ou niche pour lequel generer des idees
description.es: Industria o nicho para el que generar ideas
description.ro: Industria sau nisa pentru care se genereaza idei

inputs.bot: The business niche or industry. If not specified, use the agent's known context.

inputs.name: Timeframe

description.fr: Periode pour les idees de contenu
description.es: Periodo para las ideas de contenido

inputs.bot: How far ahead to plan content. Defaults to 'this week' if not specified.

success.es: Aqui tienes tus ideas de contenido.
